judgment.summary: High-growth business with strong gross margins and positive free cash flow, but trading at a significant valuation premium with negative net margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was 0.25 vs an estimate of 0.23 (7.0% beat), with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-07-30.
positives: Gross margin 73.3% — high profitability at the unit level.
Free cash flow (TTM) $755.00M — healthy cash generation despite net losses.
negatives: Forward P/E 131.29x — extremely high valuation relative to earnings.
Profit margin -3.7% — business is currently operating at a net loss.
Debt/Equity 230.86 — high level of leverage on the balance sheet.
Price/Sales (TTM) 30.29x — very expensive relative to revenue.
